statements.statement: I can say what I need using simple words when someone disagrees with me.

I can participate in simple activities that help fix problems with friends.

I can actively contribute to restorative conversations that explore harm and develop solutions.
I can facilitate comprehensive restorative processes that address complex harm and promote sustained healing.
